author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 16: 2 Tier-3 docs (net/* socket families). net/unix.md (AF_UNIX SOCK_STREAM/DGRAM/SEQPACKET, pathname+abstract namespaces, SCM_RIGHTS+CREDENTIALS+SECURITY, FD-passing cyclic GC, sockmap BPF — 14 REQ / 13 AC, 0 open) + net/packet.md (AF_PACKET SOCK_RAW/DGRAM, TPACKET v1/v2/v3 ringbuffer, PACKET_FANOUT all 6 modes, eBPF/cBPF filter attach, VirtIO-net pass-through, sock_diag — 14 REQ / 12 AC, 0 open). Path fix: net/unix/scm.c folded into net/core/scm.c + net/unix/garbage.c upstream — cited correctly. 11 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: ~71 .design docs. Next: net/ipv4 deeper (raw.md + icmp.md) or net/ipv6/00-overview.md Tier-2 wrapper before drilling Tier-3.
